_doc: Faithful-replay dispatch table for the rpa-is-connection-missing-dap scenario (DAP-GE-3000, deleted Box connection). Fixtures are verbatim uip CLI responses captured at investigation time. State-dependent fixtures (jobs list, bound-folder list, tenant-wide list, ping 989fd9d2) reflect the PRE-FIX state: connection 989fd9d2 deleted (404), no Box connection in folder b262689d or tenant-wide, c3a00022 the latest faulted job.

rules.match: or jobs logs c3a00022-67c7-4b04-8faa-35a726d641cc --level Error --output json

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched by `rules` returns an empty array. Lets the agent explore beyond the recorded path without aborting.
